---
title: "Scroll Test"
format: html
theme: flatly.scss
---

## Test Code Block

Here's a simple code block to test scrolling:

```python
# This is a very long code block
# Line 1
# Line 2
# Line 3
# Line 4
# Line 5
# Line 6
# Line 7
# Line 8
# Line 9
# Line 10
# Line 11
# Line 12
# Line 13
# Line 14
# Line 15
# Line 16
# Line 17
# Line 18
# Line 19
# Line 20
# Line 21
# Line 22
# Line 23
# Line 24
# Line 25
# Line 26
# Line 27
# Line 28
# Line 29
# Line 30
# Line 31
# Line 32
# Line 33
# Line 34
# Line 35
# Line 36
# Line 37
# Line 38
# Line 39
# Line 40
# Line 41
# Line 42
# Line 43
# Line 44
# Line 45
# Line 46
# Line 47
# Line 48
# Line 49
# Line 50
```

::: {.raw-html}
<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
  console.log("Script loaded");
  
  // Find all code blocks - be more specific
  const codeBlocks = document.querySelectorAll('div.sourceCode');
  console.log("Found code blocks:", codeBlocks.length);
  
  codeBlocks.forEach(function(block, index) {
    console.log("Setting up block", index, block);
    
    // Add mouse wheel event listener to the div
    block.addEventListener('wheel', function(e) {
      console.log("Wheel event on div block", index, "deltaY:", e.deltaY);
      e.preventDefault();
      e.stopPropagation();
      this.scrollTop += e.deltaY;
      return false;
    }, { passive: false, capture: true });
    
    // Also handle the pre element inside
    const preElement = block.querySelector('pre.sourceCode');
    if (preElement) {
      preElement.addEventListener('wheel', function(e) {
        console.log("Wheel event on pre element", index, "deltaY:", e.deltaY);
        e.preventDefault();
        e.stopPropagation();
        this.scrollTop += e.deltaY;
        return false;
      }, { passive: false, capture: true });
    }
    
    // Also handle the code element inside
    const codeElement = block.querySelector('code.sourceCode');
    if (codeElement) {
      codeElement.addEventListener('wheel', function(e) {
        console.log("Wheel event on code element", index, "deltaY:", e.deltaY);
        e.preventDefault();
        e.stopPropagation();
        this.scrollTop += e.deltaY;
        return false;
      }, { passive: false, capture: true });
    }
    
    // Add event listener to the entire block area
    block.addEventListener('mouseenter', function() {
      console.log("Mouse entered block", index);
    });
    
    block.addEventListener('mouseleave', function() {
      console.log("Mouse left block", index);
    });
  });
  
  // Also try a global wheel handler
  document.addEventListener('wheel', function(e) {
    const target = e.target;
    if (target.closest('.sourceCode')) {
      console.log("Global wheel event on sourceCode element");
      const sourceCode = target.closest('.sourceCode');
      if (sourceCode) {
        e.preventDefault();
        e.stopPropagation();
        sourceCode.scrollTop += e.deltaY;
        return false;
      }
    }
  }, { passive: false, capture: true });
});
</script>
:::
